description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the java:8 Docker image and runs a before_script that updates apt, installs apt-transport-https, adds the sbt repository, imports its GPG key, updates apt again, installs sbt, and prints the sbt version with 'sbt sbt-version'. Define a single job named test in the default test stage that executes the shell command 'sbt clean test'. No services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are required.
